heading: Procedures in addition to other rights of employees
label: 2105 Procedures in addition to other rights of employees
text: The rights and remedies provided to employees by this chapter are in addition to, and not in lieu of, any other contractual or statutory rights and remedies of the employees, and are not intended to alter or affect such rights and remedies, except that the period of notification required by this chapter shall run concurrently with any period of notification required by contract or by any other statute.
notes: Effective DateSection effective 6 months after , see , set out as a note under .Aug. 4, 1988section 11 of Pub. L. 100–379section 2101 of this title
